author: xbiedro
orig: jakiś gość z brazyli przyszedł się tu spłakać chłopaki mu wysłali małpe i lipe mamy
en: Some guy from Brazil came here to cry, the guys sent him a monkey and a monkey
pt: Um cara do Brasil veio aqui chorar, os caras mandaram um macaco e um macaco para ele
label: xenophobic

context.author: kangurekxkanmuru
context.orig: Witam widzę ktoś doszedł do władzy ehm gratuluje
context.en: Hello, I see someone has come to power, ehm, congratulations
context.pt: Olá, vejo que alguém chegou ao poder, eh, parabéns

context.author: qndel
context.orig: z jednej strony tak, ale z drugiej polski kanał dla Polaków xD
context.en: on the one hand, yes, but on the other hand, a Polish channel for Poles xD
context.pt: por um lado sim, mas por outro lado, um canal polaco para polacos xD
context.label: xenophobic

context.author: qndel
context.orig: my nie wchodzimy im na kanały syfu robić
context.en: we don't go into their channels to do crap
context.pt: não entramos nos canais deles para fazer merda
context.label: clean

context.author: xbiedro
context.orig: szczerze to teraz ten kanał to można usunąć
context.en: Honestly, this channel can be deleted now
context.pt: Honestamente, este canal pode ser excluído agora
context.label: xenophobic

context.author: xbiedro
context.orig: jakby, kto wytrzyma 1 dzień bez żartu o rzydzie
context.en: like, who can go a day without making a joke about a joke?
context.pt: tipo, quem consegue passar um dia sem fazer piada sobre piada?
context.label: xenophobic

context.author: xbiedro
context.en: I'm going to get a beer
context.label: clean
